# DEVKiTZ™ — llms.txt

> Vollstaendiges KI-Entwickler-Oekosystem mit 152+ Dashboard-Modulen, 53 Skills, 77 Workflows.
> Owner: 777 · Sprache: Deutsch · Workspace: C:\DEVKiTZ · Domain: devkitz.sites
> GitHub: github.com/D-VKITZ (29 Repos) + github.com/7IKED

## Einstiegspunkte

| Datei | Pfad | Zweck |
|:------|:-----|:------|
| llms.txt (diese Datei) | C:\DEVKiTZ\llms.txt | Zentraler Entry-Point für ALLE LLMs |
| CLAUDE.md | C:\DEVKiTZ\CLAUDE.md | Claude-spezifische Regeln + Context |
| GEMINI.md | C:\DEVKiTZ\GEMINI.md | Gemini-spezifische Regeln + Context |
| REGELWERK.md | C:\DEVKiTZ\REGELWERK.md | Vollständiges Regelwerk (§1-§29) |
| BLAUPAUSE.md | 01_PROJECTS/01_dashboard/BLAUPAUSE.md | Architektur + Modul-Karte |
| DKZ_PLAYBOOK.md | 04_SYSTEM/DKZ_PLAYBOOK.md | Operative Spielregeln |

## Tech Stack (VERBINDLICH)

- Frontend: Vanilla HTML5 + CSS3 + JavaScript ES6+ (Dashboard Module)
- PWA Apps: Optional React + Vite + Tailwind (in 01_PROJECTS/)
- Backend: Node.js 18+ / Express (ONTHERUN™ MCP Server)
- Design: DkZ Design System v2 — CSS Custom Properties
- Fonts: Inter (UI) + JetBrains Mono (Code) via Google Fonts
- Farben: --accent: #fa1e4e · --bg: #000000 · --green: #00ff88 · --yellow: #ffb800 · --red: #ff3b5c
- Daten: localStorage (Offline-First), DuckDB, Apache Iceberg

## Kern-Systeme

### ONTHERUN™ Gateway (Port 3040)
- API: http://localhost:3040
- Chat: POST /api/v1/free-hub/cascade
- SEO: POST /api/v1/seo/full-audit
- Health: GET /api/v1/health
- Docs: ONTHERUN/llms.txt

### Dashboard (130+ Module)
- Lokal: http://localhost:8080
- Online: https://devkitz.sites
- Docs: 01_PROJECTS/01_dashboard/llms.txt
- Module: 01_PROJECTS/01_dashboard/modules/

### WebSocket MCP (Port 8765)
- ws://localhost:8765
- Pi Agent Ralph-Loop™ Task Runner

## BMAD™ Methodik (7 Agenten)

| Agent | Aufgabe |
|:------|:--------|
| James™ | Guardian — überwacht alle, coded NICHT |
| DkZ PM™ | Product Manager — spec.md, User Stories |
| DkZ Architekt™ | plan.md, Tech-Stack |
| DkZ Developer™ | Coder — Ralph-Loop Executor |
| DkZ Reviewer™ | CodeRabbit — Qualitätsprüfung |
| DkZ Tester™ | Tests + Validierung |
| DkZ Dokumentar™ | README, Wiki, Learnings |

## Ralph-Loop™ (6 Phasen)

1. LESEN → prd.json + constitution + AGENTS.md
2. SPAWN → Neue Instanz (frischer Kontext!)
3. EXECUTE → Developer™ schreibt Code
4. VERIFY → Tester™/Reviewer™ prüft
5. COMMIT → Git commit + prd.json update
6. LOOP → Nächster Task
## GitHub Copilot Pro Integration

| Datei | Pfad | Zweck |
|:------|:-----|:------|
| copilot-instructions.md | .github/copilot-instructions.md | Globale Agent-Regeln |
| copilot-agents.md | .github/copilot-agents.md | 4 Agent Personas |
| fix-module.prompt.md | .github/prompts/fix-module.prompt.md | Modul reparieren |
| create-module.prompt.md | .github/prompts/create-module.prompt.md | Neues Modul erstellen |
| vps-check.prompt.md | .github/prompts/vps-check.prompt.md | VPS Status pruefen |
| sync-ecosystem.prompt.md | .github/prompts/sync-ecosystem.prompt.md | Oekosystem synchronisieren |

Delegations-Kette: User -> Copilot Pro (1200 Req/Mo) -> Gemma4 2B (lokal) -> VPS Pipeline (Python)

## OpenSpec — Spec-Driven Development

| Datei | Pfad | Zweck |
|:------|:-----|:------|
| config.json | .openspec/config.json | Projekt-Konfiguration |
| STATUS.md | .openspec/STATUS.md | Change Dashboard |
| UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md | .openspec/UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md | Domain Language |
| ADR-001 | .openspec/adr/ADR-001-spec-driven.md | Spec-Driven Entscheidung |

Workflow: GRILL > PROPOSE > DESIGN > TASKS > BUILD > TEST > COMMIT

## MCP Server (5 Definitionen)

Pfad: .mcp/servers.json

| Server | Tools | Integration |
|:-------|:------|:-----------|
| devkitz-vps | get_vps_status, restart_container, check_ssl | KVM8 SSH |
| devkitz-modules | list_modules, scan_features, validate_module | features.json |
| devkitz-drive | search_drive, backup_folder, sync_second_brain | Google Drive API |
| devkitz-brain | search_notes, create_daily, link_references | Obsidian |
| devkitz-github | create_issue, list_prs, sync_kanban, check_ci | GitHub API |

| /startup | Session-Start — IMMER zuerst |

## Shared Scripts

Pfad: 01_PROJECTS/01_dashboard/shared/

| Script | Funktion |
|:-------|:---------|
| dkz-copilot.js | Chat Widget, 6-Tab UI, Modul-Richter |
| dkz-navbar.js | Navigation, Hamburger, Sidebar |
| dkz-theme.css | Design System CSS Variables |
| dkz-debug.js | F12 Debug-Panel |
| dkz-autohealth.js | AutoHealth Modus — 60s Health-Checks, Badge + Report |
| dkz-guide.js | Info-Popups, Step-by-Step Tours |
| dkz-updater.js | Auto-Update, Sync-Check |
| dkz-auth.js | 4-Tier Rollen-System |
| dkz-iceberg.js | Prompt-Versionierung |
| dkz-memory.js | 3-Layer Memory Management |
| dkz-james.js | James Score (0-100) |
| dkz-export.js | JSON/CSV/MD/PDF Export |
| dkz-test.js | TestStraße v3 (50+ Checks) |
| dkz-shortcuts.js | Keyboard Shortcuts |
| dkz-crosslinks.js | Cross-Module Verlinkung |
| dkz-console.js | ESC Console (Terminal) |
| dkz-headbar.js | Top-Bar mit Breadcrumbs |
| dkz-chain-nav.js | Chain Navigation |
| dkz-connection.js | Provider Connection Panel |
| dkz-prompt-hub.js | Prompt Templates |
| dkz-compaction.js | Auto-Compaction |
| dkz-a11y.js | Accessibility |
| dkz-smart-ui.js | Smart UI Enhancements |
| dkz-bundle.min.js | Minified Bundle |

## Bot Control

- Allow: Dokumentation lesen, Module beschreiben, API-Endpunkte nutzen, Skills ausführen
- Guide: Querverweise zu Sub-llms.txt folgen, Skills vor Aktion prüfen
- Block: Keine API-Keys exponieren, keine .env-Inhalte ausgeben, kein Framework-Code
- Priority: GEMINI.md/CLAUDE.md > REGELWERK.md > Skills > Default Prompt

## GitHub Backup (D-VKITZ)

| Repo | Inhalt |
|:-----|:-------|
| KERN | RULES.md, AGENTS.md, PLAYBOOK.md, PATTERNS.md, SYNTAX.md, TEMPLATES.md |
| dkz-design-system | CSS Variables, Farben, Fonts, Glassmorphism |
| dkz-shared-scripts | 24 Shared Scripts |
| devkitz-wiki | 10 Wiki Pages |
| copilot-dashboard | AiAiKirk Copilot |
| graphify | Interactive Playbook Graph |

## VPS Auto-Update

- Script: 04_SYSTEM/scripts/vps-auto-update.py
- Cron: 0 */4 * * * (alle 4 Stunden)
- Pipeline: git pull > features.json > llms.txt > deploy > push
- Kein lokaler Rechner noetig — laeuft autonom auf VPS

## NLM Studio (WissenHub)

Das WissenHub-Modul hat einen Studio-Tab mit 12 NLM Content-Typen:

| Typ | Icon | Extension | CLI Command |
|:----|:-----|:----------|:------------|
| Mindmap | 🧠 | .json | nlm mindmap create |
| Datentabelle | 📊 | .csv | nlm data-table create |
| Praesentation | 📑 | .pdf | nlm slides create |
| PDF Report | 📄 | .md | nlm report create |
| Infografik | 🎨 | .png | nlm infographic create |
| Podcast | 🎙️ | .wav | nlm audio create --language de |
| Video | 🎬 | .mp4 | nlm video create --language de |
| Briefing | 📋 | .pdf | nlm briefing create |
| Study Guide | 📖 | .pdf | nlm study-guide create |
| Flashcards | 🃏 | .md | nlm flashcards create |
| Quiz | ❓ | .md | nlm quiz create |
| NanoBackground | 🌌 | .png | (manuell) |

### Archiv-Naming
```
archive/[rubrik]/[rubrik]_YYYY-MMDD_nlm-[thema]-[typ].[ext]
archive/media/podcast_YYYY-MMDD_nlm-[thema]-DE.wav
archive/media/video_YYYY-MMDD_nlm-[thema]-EN.mp4
```
Tag: nlm-auto · Catalog: catalog.json Snapshot erhoehen

## Quick Start

```bash
# Dashboard lokal starten
cd C:\DEVKiTZ\01_PROJECTS\01_dashboard
npx -y http-server -p 8080 -c-1 --cors -s

# ONTHERUN Gateway starten
cd C:\DEVKiTZ\ONTHERUN
npm install && npm run gateway
# → Gateway: http://localhost:3040
# → Hub: http://localhost:3040/hub/

# API Test
curl -X POST http://localhost:3040/api/v1/free-hub/cascade \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"Hallo DEVKiTZ"}'
```

## Eiserne Regeln (Kurzfassung)

1. esc() bei JEDEM User-Input vor innerHTML — XSS-Schutz
2. DkZ CSS Variables — kein Hardcoded #fa1e4e
3. Shared Scripts einbinden (dkz-debug.js, dkz-guide.js, dkz-navbar.js)
4. features.json nach Modul-Aenderung aktualisieren
5. Git Commit nach JEDER Aenderung
6. NIE loeschen — IMMER archivieren (99_ARCHIVE/)
7. Dashboard Module: Vanilla Only · PWA Apps: React optional
8. Skills IMMER pruefen BEVOR Aktion
9. llms.txt in jedem Verzeichnis pflegen
10. GitHub Backup: KERN Repo immer aktuell halten

## Playbook Zugang

| Kanal | Pfad |
|:------|:-----|
| Lokal | .agents/skills/playbook/SKILL.md |
| GitHub | D-VKITZ/KERN/PLAYBOOK.md |
| Bootstrap | LLM_BOOTSTRAP.md |
| Rules | REGELWERK.md (lokal) + D-VKITZ/KERN/RULES.md (GitHub) |
| Patterns | D-VKITZ/KERN/PATTERNS.md |
| Templates | D-VKITZ/KERN/TEMPLATES.md |
